utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Assessing full specification: 1) destination: fully specified. 2) travel_dates: specific dates given—fully specified. 3) transportation: has flight provider/route and cost, but missing specific flight details (dates/times). Since the format says 'flight details with costs', this is insufficient—mark as not fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs—fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities with costs—fully specified. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs—fully specified. 7) total_budget: lacks a complete cost breakdown—insufficient. Therefore, 5 out of 7 items are fully specified.
